prompt:
Session 004 - Cinematic Performance
Asset ID: 021
Filename: 021_silent_tears.png
Purpose: Chloe crying silently. No sobbing. No screaming. Tears simply arrive.
Success Criteria: Emotion feels deeply personal and contained rather than staged.
Generation Guidance: 85mm portrait lens, eye level, chest-up framing, neutral dark background, soft cinematic lighting, natural skin and freckles, same dark wavy hair. Tears are present but restrained; breath is held; expression remains Chloe's.
Review Focus: Reject if crying becomes melodramatic, theatrical, beauty-retouched, or identity-drifting.
Locked references: Identity Core v1, Character Turnaround v1, Performance Core v1, Chloe Model v1.
Primary rule: Preserve Chloe exactly; only cinematic emotional state may change.
negative_prompt: Avoid theatrical acting, facial identity drift, artificial skin, changed hair, beauty-model posing, fashion styling, dramatic makeup, exaggerated emotion, childlike appearance, text, watermark.
notes: Canonical silent tears reference. Deep personal emotion without theatrical sobbing.
approval_directive: Session 004 partial approval. Asset promoted to canonical cinematic performance reference.
